heading: Parameters
body:
| Parameter   | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Required? |
| ----------- | ------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| createStore | string | Name of the new federated database instance store. The federated database instance store name must be unique.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | yes       |
| provider    | string | Name of the service where the data is stored. Value can be one of the following:s3 for an AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) bucket.azure for Azure Blob Storage container.atlas for Atlas cluster.http for files hosted at publicly accessible URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s.dls:\<subtype> for online archives. Atlas Data Federation supports the following subtypes:aws - for data stored on AWS (Amazon Web Services). Value must be dls:aws.azure - for data stored on Azure (Microsoft Azure). Value must be dls:azure. | yes       |

| allowInsecure | boolean                            | Validates the scheme in the specified URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s. Value can be one of the following:true to allow insecure HTTP (HyperText Transport Protocol) schemefalse to only allow secure HTTPS (Secure HyperText Transport Protocol) scheme (default)If true, Atlas Data Federation:Does not verify the server's certificate chain and hostname.Accepts any certificate with any hostname presented by the server.WARNING: If you set this to true, your data might become vulnerable to a man-in-the-middle attack, which can compromise the confidentiality and integrity of your data. Set this to true only for testing and getting started with Atlas Data Federation.If omitted, defaults to false. | no |
| ------------- | ---------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -- |
| urls          | array of strings or an empty array | One or more publicly accessible URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s. You can't specify URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s that require authentication.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | no |
| defaultFormat | string                             | Format that Data Federation defaults to if it encounters a file without an extension while querying the federated database instance store. The following values are valid:.json, .json.gz, .bson, .bson.gz, .avro, .avro.gz, .orc, .tsv, .tsv.gz, .csv, .csv.gz, .parquetIf omitted, Data Federation attempts to detect the file type by processing a few bytes of the file.If included, the specified format only applies to the URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s in the store.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | no |
